query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN endereco IS NOT NULL AND endereco != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_endereco,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bairro IS NOT NULL AND bairro != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_bairro,
  SUM(CASE WHEN endereco IS NOT NULL AND endereco != '' AND bairro IS NOT NULL AND bairro != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_ambos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_coordenadas
FROM projects LIMIT 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN bairro IS NOT NULL AND bairro != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_bairro,
  SUM(CASE WHEN endereco IS NOT NULL AND endereco != '' AND bairro IS NOT NULL AND bairro != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_ambos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_coordenadas
FROM projects LIMIT 1;
